tool_input.description: Design database layer for the application
tool_input.prompt: Should we use PostgreSQL or SQLite? We need single-binary deployment with zero external dependencies.

tool_result:
Analysis complete. Recommendation: SQLite

Reasoning:
- Single-binary requirement eliminates PostgreSQL (requires separate server)
- SQLite embeds directly into application
- Zero configuration needed
- Perfect for deployment simplicity
- File-based storage aligns with portability goals

Implementation: Created storage/db.go with SQLite, using modernc.org/sqlite for pure Go implementation (no CGO needed for true single binary)
